title: Preparing the Merry for the Sky
description: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
scene: Across pages 15, 16, 17, 18, this scene centers on Masira, Bellamy, Mont Blanc Cricket, Shojo, Chopper. The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The repairs are all comin' apart!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We're gonna sink if we stay here!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: And then the chick says to me,

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: "Tell me where this Mont Blanc Cricket lives."

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Haha! Sounds like a feisty one!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sounds like!? You haven't half the idea!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: But what'd she want with Mont Blanc Cricket?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Get you infected with stupidity!

summary: The Straw Hats meet Mont Blanc Cricket and the Saruyama Alliance, whose lives are tied to the legend of Noland and the search for sky.
